arguments.summary: All 5 tests pass. Sliding window limiter stores timestamps per IP, prunes expired entries on each Allow() call, and correctly counts remaining quota.
arguments.final_answer:
Implemented sliding window rate limiter with TDD:
- pkg/ratelimit/limiter.go: Limiter stores per-IP timestamps, prunes expired entries (outside window) on each Allow() call. Mutex for thread safety. Remaining() returns unused quota.
- pkg/ratelimit/limiter_test.go: 5 tests covering within-limit, over-limit rejection, IP isolation, window expiry (50ms test window), and remaining count.
All 5 tests pass.
